title: The Number Blocks
description: This Mod adds Number Blocks and Number Creators
body:
# The Number Blocks

This is a mod created by Samuel Rodriguez

[Translate: Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/the-number-blocks-mod/invite?h=1a3ac659e78615a38da304b58e0887392381025)
![1.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf1171c3b3fc0b1e4d3db0b0e13ba0fd96aa177b.png)


This Mod adds Number Blocks and Number Creators

All modloaders (1.20.1+)
[Requires LotTimeLib](https://sites.google.com/view/lot-timelib/home)

Forge + NeoForge
[Requires Structure Gel API](https://sites.google.com/view/structure-gel-api/home)

[Requires Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

Fabric
[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Requires Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Blocks
